evidence.source_title: Iranian drones strike Azerbaijan's Nakhchivan international airport
evidence.description: Azerbaijan's Ministry of Defense confirmed technical monitoring systems identified the UAVs as belonging to Iran's armed forces. Iran denied responsibility. IRGC is Iran's primary drone-strike operator.

editorial_notes: Iran denied involvement. Azerbaijani technical monitoring attributed the UAVs to Iran's armed forces. IRGC assumed primary operator; confidence set to alleged pending formal attribution.
